name: Cat Litter Scooper Blue Medium
description: This cat litter scooper is portable, lightweight, and durable. ? Flat, thin, & sharp leading edge sits flush against your cat litter box floor to scoop underneath cat litter, rather than into clumped litter. ? Faster sifting. ? High walls on this litter scoop prevent scatter. ? Comfortable, ergonomic & longer type handle.
